name: add-condition
instruction: Modify `find_price` so that if the found product's price is greater than 500, return `0` instead (treat very expensive items as unavailable). Use `if p.price <= 500 then p.price else 0` to add the condition. Keep the not-found default (0) unchanged. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. Conditional: `if cond then a else b`. Comparison: `<=`, `>`. `list.filter(xs, (x) => bool)` filters elements.
